message:
fix(wizard): fix pre tag whitespace in Wrangler docs

Use template literal for pre content to avoid JSX indentation
appearing in rendered output.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -277,10 +277,8 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() {
  • Create a token with the permissions you need (e.g., Workers, Pages)
  • Add to your ~/.zshrc:
    • - 
    -              export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="your-token-here"{'\n'}
-              export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"
-
    + 
    {`export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="your-token-here"
+export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"`}

    Then run source ~/.zshrc or start a new shell.
